{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Sun Day
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Sun Day]] is a mid-year celebration occurring in a few weeks.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c14">''Unsouled'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Sun Day]] is a time or event mentioned in relation to advancing stages.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
